User Need Description: The system shall detect falls in elderly users in real time
Design Input Requirement: The device shall detect a fall event within 2 seconds of occurrence with sensitivity >= 95%
Verification Test Description: Algorithm unit test: sensitivity >= 95% on labeled fall dataset (n=500 events)
Validation Test Description: Simulated use test: fall detection in representative environment with 10 users (5 falls each)
Notes: Primary safety requirement — missed fall is highest risk scenario

User Need Description: The system shall minimize false alarms to avoid alert fatigue
Design Input Requirement: False positive rate shall be <= 5 per user per day in normal daily activity
Design Output Artifact: Fall detection algorithm — specificity tuning and activity classifier
Verification Test Description: Algorithm unit test: specificity across ADL (Activities of Daily Living) dataset (n=1000 events)
Validation Test Description: 7-day wear study: false alarm rate measured in home environment (n=20 users)
Notes: Alert fatigue reduces caregiver response compliance

User Need Description: The system shall alert caregivers within 60 seconds of fall detection
Design Input Requirement: Alert notification shall be delivered to caregiver app <= 60 seconds from fall event detection
Design Output Artifact: Alert pipeline: device firmware -> cloud -> caregiver app push notification
Verification Test Description: End-to-end latency test: 100 simulated fall events — all alerts < 60s
Validation Test Description: Usability study: caregiver receives and acts on alert within acceptance time (n=15 caregivers)

User Need Description: The system shall operate continuously for >= 7 days without charging
Design Input Requirement: Device battery life shall be >= 7 days in normal operation at 25 degrees C
Design Output Artifact: Power management hardware design and firmware power modes
Verification Test Description: Battery life bench test: continuous operation until discharge (3 units)
Validation Test Description: Field simulation: 10-day continuous wear test (n=5 units)

User Need Description: The system shall be worn comfortably by elderly users with limited dexterity
Design Input Requirement: Device weight shall be <= 30g. Donning/doffing shall be completable by >= 90% of target users without assistance
Design Output Artifact: Mechanical design — wrist-worn enclosure and strap
Validation Test Description: Human factors study: 15 elderly users (65+ years) attempt donning/doffing — >= 90% success criterion

User Need Description: The system shall protect user health data per applicable privacy regulations
Design Input Requirement: All personal health data shall be encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Device shall comply with HIPAA Security Rule
Design Output Artifact: Software security architecture — encryption modules and data handling
Verification Test Description: Security code review and penetration test report; encryption verification test
Validation Test Description: Security validation: HIPAA compliance audit by independent reviewer
Notes: Data breach — regulatory and reputational risk

User Need Description: The system shall be safe for use by elderly users with common comorbidities
Design Input Requirement: Device shall meet IEC 60601-1 general safety requirements. No single fault shall result in patient harm
Design Output Artifact: Hardware safety design — electrical isolation and material biocompatibility
Verification Test Description: Electrical safety testing per IEC 60601-1 (dielectric strength and leakage current); biocompatibility testing per ISO 10993
Validation Test Description: Simulated use safety evaluation: no safety incidents across all validation use scenarios
Notes: Electrical shock or skin irritation risk

User Need Description: The system shall provide reliable location information to facilitate emergency response
Design Input Requirement: Device shall report GPS location with accuracy <= 10m outdoors and communicate last-known location indoors
Design Output Artifact: GPS module integration and fallback indoor location (BLE/WiFi)
Verification Test Description: GPS accuracy test: 50 outdoor locations — >= 95% within 10m; indoor fallback test
Validation Test Description: Simulated emergency response drill: caregiver locates device using app (n=10 scenarios)

User Need Description: Caregivers shall receive useful status information about the device and user
Design Input Requirement: Caregiver app shall display device battery level
Design Output Artifact: and fall event history updated every 15 minutes
Validation Test ID: App functional test: battery level accuracy +/-5%; status update latency <= 15 min; fall history completeness
Risk ID: Usability study: caregivers rate information utility and comprehension (SUS score >= 70)

User Need Description: The system shall withstand typical environmental conditions for elderly users
Design Input Requirement: Device shall be rated IP67 (dust-tight and immersion to 1m for 30 min). Operating temperature: 0 to 45 degrees C
Design Output Artifact: Environmental sealing design — enclosure gaskets and material selection
Verification Test Description: IP67 ingress protection test per IEC 60529 (3 units); temperature cycling test per IEC 60068-2
Validation Test Description: Environmental stress validation: shower simulation (n=3 units) and temperature soak
Notes: Water ingress during bathing/showering causes device failure
